Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus X88 Timings Abu Dhabi Bus Station to ADNOC Bus Station

January 22, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transport succeeds as an efficiently functioning system of transport covering the needs of a population and its visitors. The X88 route overview offers you operational timings, major stops and some handy travel tips to make your journey as easy as possible.

Contents

Operational Details

The Bus X88 has a reliable schedule and reliable departures all day. Below is the detailed timetable for Bus X88 from both Abu Dhabi Bus Station and ADNOC Bus Station:

From Abu Dhabi Bus Station From ADNOC Bus Station
07:00 06:00
10:00 09:00
13:00 12:00
16:00 15:00
19:00 18:00
22:00 21:00

Download PDF Bus X88

Bus X88 TimetableDetailed schedules can be found on the official AD Mobility website or you can visit this link for X88 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Standard fares on this route start at AED 2 for single zone travel and the Hafilat Card is the preferred payment method. It’s also easy to recharge cards at kiosks or online.

Route Overview

Bus X88 connects key landmarks and transport hubs in Abu Dhabi, offering access to important destinations:

  1. Abu Dhabi Bus Station: Starting point in the city center.

  2. Musaffah — Mohamed Bin Zayed City Bus Station: Serving residential and commercial hubs.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Dhannah, Central Bus Station · A: Key stop in Al Dhannah.

  2. Al Dhannah, ADNOC Bus Station: Final stop near ADNOC facilities.

There are some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can visit which include the N43 Bus Route that starts from Corniche Hospital to Qaryat Al Beri Souq.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

While the X88 route primarily connects transit hubs and key neighborhoods, travelers can explore nearby attractions at select stops:

  1. Abu Dhabi Bus Station: Close to popular shopping areas and dining options.

2.

  1. Al Dhannah: A strategic location for accessing ADNOC facilities and nearby amenities.

Journey Experience

It was a long journey, but enjoyable journey on the X88 bus from Abu Dhabi Bus Station to ADNOC Bus Station in Abu Dhabi. That route presented views of the city’s convivial mix of modernity and tradition, including a sliver of the iconic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, a magnificent Islamic ode to architecture.

When it’s comfortable and accessible, or even, extending that ride for hours doesn’t seem so bad, and the perfect bus to do this on is one you’ll have made friends with, especially if you’re looking to know Abu Dhabi’s other charms.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: January 22, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
